params.name: Calydonian Boar Skin
params.description:
On Mar 8, 569 BC, Meleager delivered the fatal blow to the Calydonian boar with his own spear and gave its skin to Atalanta.
To punish the king who forgot to prepare his own sacrifice, the goddess Artemis summoned the Calydonian boar, which brought many disasters to the land. Therefore, Meleager led a group of heroes to hunt and kill the wild boar. During this process, Atalanta, who was a woman, was the first to injure the boar, winning the admiration of Meleager and receiving the boar's skin …
